_about: Post-generator scan checks for Elixir generators (mix phx.new, mix igniter.new). Fire once after the generator command completes, against the new project tree.

checks.message: config/runtime.exs configures Endpoint without a System.get_env("PORT") fallback. The phx.new template is fine in prod (PORT is set) but causes :eaddrinuse / silent port-override bugs in dev when the default 4000 is busy. Fix: read port from System.get_env("PORT") || "4000" before the Endpoint config block.

secret_key_base in runtime.exs without an env-var read. Generated runtime.exs reads SECRET_KEY_BASE from env in prod; if you removed that, the generator default is wrong for production. Restore the System.fetch_env!/get_env read.
